source_note: Idaho PUC Order No. 35421 (Final Order, service date May 31, 2022), Case No. IPC-E-22-11, on Idaho Power Company's annual Power Cost Adjustment (PCA) effective June 1, 2022 through May 31, 2023 — an overall revenue increase of ~$103.4 million (8.27%) (10 pp). Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Idaho PUC fileroom (puc.idaho.gov/Fileroom/PublicFiles/ELEC/IPC/IPCE2211/OrdNotc/20220531Final_Order_No_35421.pdf).
